posts.title: React笔记一
posts.text: js工具 JSON String转json对象：JSON.parse() json对象转json String：JSON.stringify() 时间格式转换12let sdate = new Date(r.create_time).toJSON();let sdate2 = new Date(+new Date(sdate) + 8 * 3600 * 1000).toISOString().replace(/T/g, ' ').replace(/\.[\d]{3}Z/, ''); 百分比计算 Math.round(value/total*10000)/100.00 实用三方库 json组件1234import ReactJson from 'react-json-view';<ReactJson src={this.state.jsonSrc} name={null} iconStyle="square" collapseStringsAfterLength={30} displayDataTypes={false} collapsed={false} style={{fontFamily:'微软雅黑'}}/> echarts组件12345678import ReactEcharts from "echarts-for-react";import echartsTheme from '../../theme/tabletheme1';componentWillMount(){ echarts.registerTheme('theme', echartsTheme); }<ReactEcharts option={this.getOption()} style={{height: 400}} theme="theme"></ReactEcharts>

posts.title: Hello World
posts.excerpt: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
